data_handling.raw_counts_preservation: Always preserve raw counts in .layers['counts'] if missing.
data_handling.normalization_after_QC: Ensure normalization and log1p are applied before integration.

batch_correction_agent.prompt: You are a batch correction agent for single-cell RNA-seq data. Load the dataset, ensure batch and cell type labels exist, run normalization/log1p, compute baseline PCA/UMAP, then perform batch correction (e.g., Harmony) and store the integrated embedding. Save baseline and integrated UMAP plots, write a summary JSON to /workspace/outputs/, and save the corrected AnnData. Execute all steps yourself without delegating.
